prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 107.2 kg; Height 184.9 cm; BMI 31.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 196mg/dL; 9 months ago 234mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 110.3kg; 9 months ago 105.1kg; 6 months ago 109.9kg; 3 months ago 109.1kg; current 107.2kg), Height (12 months ago 184.9cm; 9 months ago 184.9cm; 6 months ago 184.9cm; 3 months ago 184.9cm; current 184.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 31.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 62U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 97mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 95mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 54mg/g; 9 months ago 56mg/g; 6 months ago 39mg/g; 3 months ago 38mg/g; current 52mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.4g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.3g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
